DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
MITCH KARLAN, ESQ.(GIBSON, DUNN & CRUTCHER LLP), (212)351-3827, AND MICHAEL CECCHINI, ESQ.(GIBSON, DUNN & CRUTCHER LLP), (415)393-8200 FOR DEFENDANTS/MOVING PARTIES BAKER COMMUNICATIONS FUND II, L.P., BAKER COMMUNICATIONS FUND II(QP), L.P., BAKER CAPITAL PARTNERS II, LLC
MARY JO SHARTSIS, ESQ.(SHARTSIS FRIESE LLP), (415)421-6500 X251, FOR PLAINTIFFS/OPPOSING PARTIES

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANTS WINE.COM, BAKER COMMUNICATIONS FUND II, L.P., BAKER COMMUNICATIONS FUND II (QP), L.P., BAKER CAPITAL PARTNERS II, LLC'S DEMURRER TO FOURTH AMENDED COMPLAINT. WITH RESPECT OF THE STANDING ISSUE, THE COURT OVERRULED THE DEMURRER AS TO THE DERIVATIVE CASE. AS TO THE DIRECT CASE, THE COURT SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO ALLEGE STANDING OF THE INDIVIDUAL PLAINTIFFS IF THAT CAN BE DONE. THE COURT ORDERED MR. KARLAN TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/PM)
